title: Workload widget - Effort
excerpt:
Hi, we are starting to use the workload widget and I would lie to know if the effort column we have on our board can be in days or does it have to be in hours ? 
Thanks

posts.author: RichardT (Richard )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, we are starting to use the workload widget and I would lie to know if the effort column we have on our board can be in days or does it have to be in hours ?

Thanks

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Richard! You can absolutely make the effort setting as days! You might just want to view the Workload Widget in “weeks” or “months” so that the days make more sense and use the Timeline Column instead of Date Column. Let us know what you think!
